verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_2: And the producers of sparks [when] striking
verse.verse_5: Arriving thereby in the center collectively,
verse.verse_6: Indeed mankind, to his Lord, is ungrateful.
verse.verse_7: And indeed, he is to that a witness.
verse.verse_8: And indeed he is, in love of wealth, intense.
verse.verse_9: But does he not know that when the contents of the graves are scattered
verse.verse_10: And that within the breasts is obtained,
verse.verse_11: Indeed, their Lord with them, that Day, is [fully] Acquainted.
